Text:
### **CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION WORK INSTRUCTIONS Zebra Technologies** ZERT COMMUNICATION DEVICES PROCESS **Work Instruction No. Revision No.** 01 **Site Code** WI03 **Page** 1 OF 5

# 1. OVERVIEW

This document outlines the process for using the Zebra devices TC78 for ZERT communication purposes only.

## 2. ZERT COMMUNICATION DEVICES

- **1.** The ZERT member will be assigned a Zebra Communication Device.
- **2.** The ZERT member will be assigned a holster.
  - ✓ The ZERT member is responsible for their own holster.
- **3.** The device must be on you during your shift, not on your mobile station or desk.
- **4.** The device works in/outside the facility and its surrounding areas.
- **5.** The devices must be kept on the Zebra premises.
- **6.** At the beginning of your shift, grab your designated device.
- **7.** Sign in to the device; if asked for an activation code, select "Activate with ESN."
- **8.** Test the device to ensure it is working properly.
- **9.** If there is an issue with the device, report it to IT promptly.
- **10.** Please remember the device will be used only for ZERT communication.
- **11.** At the end of your shift, return the device to the charging station; do not store it in lockers or take it home.

## 3. SIGNING IN THE DEVICE

**1.** Select the Workforce Application on the Device home screen.

![](_page_0_Picture_18.jpeg)

![](_page_0_Picture_19.jpeg)

## **CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION WORK INSTRUCTIONS Zebra Technologies** ZERT COMMUNICATION DEVICES PROCESS **Work Instruction No. Revision No.** 01 **Site Code** WI03 **Page** 2 OF 5

**2.** Sign in on the app using the credentials below.

The username is the Employee ID (*located on the front of the badge*)

**Universal password:** Zebrawelcome!2

![](_page_1_Picture_4.jpeg)

![](_page_1_Picture_5.jpeg)

## 4. APPLICATION NAVIGATION

- **1.** Application dashboard contains:
  - a. Favorites, Contacts and Groups
  - b. The search function is the 3 dots in the top right-hand corner.

![](_page_1_Picture_10.jpeg)

- **2.** The text function can be used if the person is signed in on the device.
- **3.** This icon indicates that the associate is not online.
- **4.** Click on the contact and press the text icon; the text icon can be used on the Favorites, Contacts, and Groups tabs.

**5.** To use the push-to-talk function, select the contact you want and press and hold the microphone button to talk into the device. ![](_page_2_Picture_3.jpeg) - **6.** The push-to-talk function can be used on tabs (Favorites, Contacts and Groups). - **7.** In the Groups tab, select the group and press the down arrow to see who is in the group. - ✓ IT is the only personnel that can add or remove ZERT members from the ZERT group on the device. ![](_page_2_Picture_7.jpeg) *This document contains proprietary information which is the exclusive property of Zebra Technologies Corp.* | CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION | | | | | | |---------------------------------------------|----------------------|--------------------|--|--|--| | WORK INSTRUCTIONS | | | | | | | ZERT
